src: [mirror of https://gitlab.com/veloren/veloren] An open world, open source voxel RPG inspired by Dwarf Fortress and Cube World. This repository is a mirror. Please submit all PRs and issues on our GitLab page.
ja: （https://gitlab.com/veloren/veloren のミラー）Dwarf FortressとCube Worldに着想を得たオープンワールドのオープンソースボクセルRPG。このリポジトリはミラーです。PRとissueはGitLabページへ
